mutation CreateFramework(
  $name: String
  $description: String
  $organizationId: Int
  $team: Int
) {
  createFramework(
    framework: {
      name: $name
      description: $description
      organizationId: $organizationId
      team: $team
    }
  ) {
    framework {
      id
      name
      description
      organizationId
      createdBy
      createDate
      lastModified
      modifiedBy
      version
      deleted
      team
      numberOfUsers
      highestCriteriaId
      lowestCriteriaId
      averageOxScore
      totalCriteriaWeight
      numReports
  
    }
  }
}

mutation CreateReport(
  $name: String
  $summary: String
  $analyticQuestion: String
  $frameworkIds: [Int]
  $organizationId: Int
  $sourceId: Int
  $team: Int
) {
  createReport(
    report: {
      name: $name
      summary: $summary
      analyticQuestion: $analyticQuestion
      organizationId: $organizationId
      sourceId: $sourceId
      frameworkIds: $frameworkIds
      team: $team
    }
  ) {
    report {
      id
      name
      team
       sourceId
      frameworkId
      summary
      analyticQuestion
      organizationId
      createdBy
      createDate
      lastModified
      modifiedBy
      feedbackScore
      feedbackComment
    }
  }
}
